title: June 8, 2015 – Kickin’ Krotch
summary: Hailing from Tobique First Nation, Elsipogtog and Burnt Church, New Brunswick, the band Kickin’ Krotch integrates cultural storytelling and Indigenous values into their hard rock/metal music. They are a five piece all Aboriginal (Maliseet & Mi’kmaq) rock band. Member Mike Bernard talks with us of th...
